query:
SELECT
  COALESCE(contentText, '<NULL>') AS preview,
  submissionType,
  COUNT(*) AS n
FROM assignmentSubmissions
WHERE adultNotes LIKE '%archived%'
GROUP BY contentText, submissionType
ORDER BY n DESC
LIMIT 15;
command:

  submissionType,
  COUNT(*) AS n
FROM assignmentSubmissions
WHERE adultNotes LIKE '%archived%'
GROUP BY contentText, submissionType
ORDER BY n DESC
LIMIT 15;

rows.preview: I went to bed, me still red.

messages: At night I found fake blood. I did not know what to do about this, so I decided to use it. I did not think about the problems that would come.
So I tried to make it look real. So I put fake blood on my forehead. I did not like the way it looked, so I tried again and again. Eventually it was all over the place.
Then the spider came. The spider came near where I was sitting. I went on top of the cover. The spider left. I did not know where the spider went. I stood on the cover. I put more fake blood on me.

At night I found fake blood. I did not know what to do about this, so I decided to use it. I did not think about the problems that would come.

So I tried to make it look real. So I put fake blood on my forehead. I did not like the way it looked, so I tried again and again. Eventually it was all over the place.

Then the spider came. The spider came near where I was sitting. I went on top of the cover. The spider left. I did not know where the spider went. I stood on the cover. I put more fake blood on me.
